offer: For insurance brokers processing 10-20 policies/month, missed renewals cause lost commissions. We automate renewal tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets or calendars.
problem: Difficulty in tracking insurance policy renewals and notifying clients in a timely manner.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo video
Community forums where insurance brokers share tools
try_it: Let users try policy tracking and notification on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing policy data
